message:
fix: stop witness patrol from nuking idle polecats (gt-s8bq)

The witness patrol treated idle polecats as zombies when the agent process
had exited, restarting them unnecessarily. Idle polecats are healthy — they
have agent_state="idle", no hook_bead, and their sandbox is preserved for
reuse by future slings.

Changes:
- Add idle state check at the top of the live-session patrol path. Idle
  polecats with clean sandboxes are skipped entirely. Idle polecats with
  dirty sandboxes (uncommitted changes) are escalated for recovery.
- Remove duplicated inline zombie checks in DetectZombiePolecats that
  repeated the same logic already in detectZombieLiveSession, which was
  causing double detection and double restart of the same zombies.

Ref: persistent-polecat-pool.md "Witness Integration" section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
